summary: P1 Request Detail Page Testing Complete - All 15 features verified. Service catalog shows 9 service cards, tailored forms render correctly with correct fields for Video Editing 60s and YouTube Long Form, clients never see L1/L2 category selectors, form submission creates order with service_template_id/service_name/service_fields, redirect to Request Detail page works. Request Detail page shows service badge, plain-language status banner, structured service-specific fields, 3 tabs (Tasks/Messages/Files), sidebar with all required info, and linked tasks empty state.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created with service_template_id for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Request Detail page fully tested and working. All 15 features from requirements verified: (1) Service catalog shows 9 cards at /services, (2) Video Editing 60s opens tailored form with correct fields, (3) YouTube Long Form opens DIFFERENT form with YouTube-specific fields, (4) No L1/L2 category selectors visible to clients, (5) Form submission stores service_template_id/service_name/service_fields, (6) Redirect to /requests/:id after submission, (7) Service badge in header, (8) Plain-language status banner, (9) Structured service-specific fields displayed, (10) Sidebar shows Service/Status/Requester/Assigned to/Deadline/Created, (11) 3 tabs: Tasks/Messages/Files, (12) Linked tasks shows 'No tasks linked' when empty, (13) My Requests shows service_name instead of category_name, (14) Backend GET /api/service-templates returns 9 templates, (15) Backend POST /api/orders with service_template_id auto-resolves hidden category L1.
